title: Arignar Anna Zoological Park
tagline: Arignar Anna Zoological Park — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Arignar Anna Zoological Park, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Arignar Anna Zoological Park also known as the Vandalur Zoo, is a zoological garden in Chennai, India.
overview.description: Arignar Anna Zoological Park also known as the Vandalur Zoo, is a zoological garden in Chennai, India. It is located at Vandalur in the south western part of the city, about 32 km (20 mi) from the city center. It is spread over an area of 602 ha (1,490 acres) and is amongst the largest zoos in South Asia. The park is open for public viewing.

topPlaces.name: Vandalur Reserve Forest
topPlaces.description: Vandalur Reserve Forest is a protected area located in the suburb of Vandalur to the southwestern part of Chennai, about 30 km from the city centre. It is bordered by the Grand Southern Trunk (GST) Road in the west and Suddhanandha Bharathi Street on the northern and the eastern sides and is intersected by the Vandalur–Kelambakkam Road on the southern side.

topPlaces.name: Vandalur
topPlaces.description: Vandalur is a suburb of the city of Chennai and a taluk in Chengalpattu district. The Arignar Anna Zoological Park is situated in the locality.

topPlaces.name: Gold Souk Grande Mall Chennai
topPlaces.description: Gold Souk Grandé is a shopping mall, in the city of Chennai, India. The project was unveiled in April 2009 by actress Shobana.

topPlaces.name: Kilambakkam bus terminus, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Kilambakkam Bus Terminus, officially Kalaignar Centenary Bus Terminus, is a bus terminus in Kilambakkam, a southern suburb of Chennai, India. Spread over an area of 88.52 acres (358,200 m2), it is situated along the GST Road.

topPlaces.name: Perungalathur
topPlaces.description: Perungalathur (Tamil: [peɾɯŋɡaɭattuːɾ]) is a neighborhood in the city of Tambaram, South Chennai, situated within the Chennai Metropolitan Area, Tamil Nadu, India. Formerly a Town Panchayat,it was merged into the Tambaram City Municipal Corporation in November 2021.

topPlaces.name: Kilambakkam
topPlaces.description: Kilambakkam is a neighborhood in Tambaram, Chennai City, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located between Vandalur and Urapakkam along Grand Southern Trunk Road (GST Road).

topPlaces.name: Thiruneermalai
topPlaces.description: Thiruneermalai is a neighborhood in the city of Chennai Tambaram, situated within the Chennai Metropolitan Area, Tamil Nadu, India. Originally a town panchayat in Chengalpattu district, Thiruneermalai is now a part of Pammal Zone under Tambaram Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Peerkankaranai
topPlaces.description: Peerkankaranai is a neighborhood in the city of Tambaram, situated within the Chennai Metropolitan Area, Tamil Nadu, India. Originally a town panchayat, it was merged with the Tambaram Municipal Corporation in 2021.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Arignar Anna Zoological Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Arignar Anna Zoological Park is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Arignar Anna Zoological Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (29 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Arignar Anna Zoological Park?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Arignar Anna Zoological Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Arignar Anna Zoological Park?
faq.a: Stays in Arignar Anna Zoological Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Arignar Anna Zoological Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vandalur Reserve Forest, Vandalur, Gold Souk Grande Mall Chennai, Kilambakkam bus terminus, Chennai, Perungalathur.
